description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet with a single large door that swings open to reveal multiple horizontal shelves inside. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood, with a white-painted exterior and natural wood-toned shelves visible on the interior. The door is solid and lacks any visible handles or glass panels, giving it a minimalist, modern appearance. The cabinet is mounted on a wooden platform, suggesting it is freestanding and not attached to a wall. The shelves inside are evenly spaced and appear suitable for storing books, tools, or other small items. The overall design is functional and clean, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A tall, freestanding cabinet with a white exterior and multiple interior wooden shelves, featuring a single solid door with a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door and five visible wooden shelves inside the cabinet.
description_view_1: Angled side view with the door partially open, revealing the plain white exterior and the thickness of the door.
description_view_2: Rear side view showing the solid white back and side panels of the cabinet, with the door mostly closed.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the edge of the open door and the dark side of the shelving unit.
